title: Chase, DoorDash and Mastercard Announce Partnership to Launch Credit Card
text: WILMINGTON, Del., SAN FRANCISCO & PURCHASE, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Chase, the largest co-brand card issuer in the U.S., and DoorDash, the local commerce platform, today announced plans to launch the first-ever DoorDash credit card, with Mastercard as the exclusive payments network for the new card. The DoorDash Rewards Mastercard will allow cardmembers to unlock benefits and earn rewards on purchases both on and off the DoorDash platform. “Connecting people with the best of their neighborhoods

title: Convenience Store Retailer EG America Teams With Doordash
text: Convenience, coffee, food and fuel retailer EG America is partnering with on-demand delivery service platform Doordash to bring fast at-home delivery of convenience staples to consumers across the country.

title: DoorDash (DASH) Partners With Big Lots to Boost E-commerce
text: DoorDash (DASH) ties up with Big Lots to provide customers in the United States with more than 36,000 products. This will increase its total orders and expand marketplace GOV.

title: Dick's Sporting Goods Partners With DoorDash to Expand Retailer's Same-Day Delivery
text: On Friday (Sept. 16), DoorDash announced a new partnership with sports equipment and apparel retailer Dick's Sporting Goods to give retail consumers access to same-day delivery.

title: DoorDash Expands Nonfood Partners in Same-Day Delivery Push

title: FTC sends a warning to Uber, Lyft, DoorDash and other ‘gig-work' companies
text: The Federal Trade Commission announced Thursday that it plans to crack down on the exploitation of gig workers, whom the agency said are entitled to protection regardless of their worker classification.

title: Big Lots Partners With DoorDash to Meet Consumer Demand for Delivery
text: On-demand delivery of bargain-priced merchandise will be available to consumers under a new partnership between Big Lots and DoorDash.

title: Starbucks and DoorDash to launch delivery partnership in Atlanta, expand delivery nationwide in 2023
text: Starbucks is adding a new delivery partner, as the coffee giant has entered into a partnership with DoorDash that will expand nationally in 2023, the companies confirmed to TechCrunch on Tuesday. The two companies will begin testing delivery in Atlanta tomorrow, starting with stores in Sacramento and Houston.

title: DoorDash Builds out Food Empire With New Grocery Delivery Partners
text: As the largest grocers in the country build out their in-house fulfillment capabilities, with Kroger on a spree of opening new eCommerce fulfillment centers and Walmart now even offering white-label fulfillment to other retailers, the next tier of grocers is still stuck for the most part with third-party options.

title: 7 High-Risk Stocks to Buy for Huge Rewards
